meaning: <拉>Veterinariae Medicinae Doctor 兽医学博士(=Doctor ofVeterinary Medicine)
examples: A VMD process communicates with the security server.
The fs agent consists of VMD and secfsd processes.
You can use the secfsd and vmd processes as commands by specifying options.
But even if the VMD grants a licence for BCG to be used in cattle, field trials still need to be held to prove that it works under real farm conditions as well as experimental ones.
